James Talarico’s priority is “abortions for people who are transgender.”

We introduce you to this weirdo on Verdict: podcasts.apple.com/us/podcas…

Video

True.


Jesse Kelly (@JesseKellyDC)

Dear GOP:

Democrats have created 3 hour wait times at the airport because they don’t want illegal aliens deported.

There’s your messaging. Put it on repeat.



— https://nitter.net/JesseKellyDC/status/2035061618694869026#m

Fantastic idea.


Kenny Webster (@KennethRWebster)

From this day forward: every school and street in Texas named after Cesar Chavez shall be renamed after Chuck Norris.



— https://nitter.net/KennethRWebster/status/2035001700923109695#m

Schumer doesn’t care about the pain he is inflicting.


Gunther Eagleman™ (@GuntherEagleman)

🚨CHAOS at LGA! Massive TSA lines at LaGuardia Airport in Queens are stretching ALL THE WAY to the parking lot, total meltdown in NYC right now.

Chuck Schumer did this.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/GuntherEagleman/status/2034966298283725116#m

Anyone who believes Israel killed Charlie Kirk has lost their mind. 

That’s a moonbat theory. 

We break down Joe Kent’s attacks on President Trump on Verdict: podcasts.apple.com/us/podcas…

Video

END THE DEMOCRAT TSA SHUTDOWN NOW!!!


Ella Dorsey (@Ella__Dorsey)

Y'all... I've NEVER seen Hartsfield Jackson this bad. This is what security looks like this morning (Friday). We've talked to people that got to the airport at 3am that missed their 6am flight. 
@ATLNewsFirst @GAFollowers

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/Ella__Dorsey/status/2034953731322638680#m

Insanity.


Riley Gaines (@Riley_Gaines_)

Do you realize how insane this is? There are 61 males competing on girls’ teams in a single county in Colorado.

SIXTY ONE boys on girls’ teams in just one county.



— https://nitter.net/Riley_Gaines_/status/2034810582579241332#m

Amen.


U.S. Senator John Fetterman (@SenFettermanPA)

The Iranian regime executed a 19 year old for demanding democracy.  

I stand with his memory and the thousands of other young Iranians.

Those who grieve the elimination of Iranian leaders over murdered protesters is telling.



— https://nitter.net/SenFettermanPA/status/2034656348407844984#m

Chuck Norris was a patriot, a man of deep faith, and one hell of a fighter. 

Originally an Okie, but made an honorary Texan in 2017. 

Rest in peace, Walker, Texas Ranger. ❤️🙏❤️

Today’s podcast is brought to you by the letter H. 

H for hypocrisy from Kathy Hochul, James Talarico, Joe Kent, and Cesar Chavez. 

Don’t miss today’s episode of Verdict: podcasts.apple.com/us/podcas…

Video

Of course it was.


Kasra Aarabi (کسری اعرابی) (@KasraAarabi)

Tucker Carlson’s interview with Joe Kent, fmr director of National Counterterrorism Center, was dubbed in Persian & broadcast live on the Islamic regime’s propaganda channel. The broadcast is shown alongside footage of the IRGC targeting a U.S. fighter jet & pro-regime rallies.





— https://nitter.net/KasraAarabi/status/2034967984842608751#m
